title: flags.yaml
description: Lightweight feature flag registry for stacked-diff gating. Declared at repo root; resolved by agent-coordinator/src/feature_flags.py (see design.md D7).

flags.description: Registered flags. Order is informational only.

name.description: Upper snake-case flag identifier. Referenced by FF_<NAME> env var and is_enabled(name) calls.

owner.description: OpenSpec change-id that owns this flag (creator).

status.description: Current state. 'archived' is reserved for Phase 2; Phase 1 only uses 'disabled' and 'enabled'.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the flag gates.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the flag was first registered.

archived_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the flag was archived (Phase 2 only).
